content:
Hello. As a home design and building code consultant, I'm ready to assist with your architectural projects in the 95112 area (San Jose, CA).

I can provide guidance on:

- Home design and renovation concepts
- Building codes and regulations relevant to your jurisdiction
- Construction best practices and material recommendations
- Permit, zoning, and safety considerations
- Cost estimates and budgeting insights

Please share details about your current project or specific questions you have.
